commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an Agent OS full-local Docker substrate with sidecars, an NVIDIA Sentinel proxy, capability-agent/proof contracts, docs, package entries, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +845, Tests +5174, Docs +327, Config +15, Other +9042. Total +15403 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a bug report. The review blockers are source-proven from the PR diff and current-main contracts, not from a runtime reproduction attempt.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer decision is needed on Docker exposure and Sentinel/provider security boundaries before a repair lane can safely reshape the PR.

target.title: feat: add Agent OS full-local substrate
target.body:
## Summary

Adds the first Agent OS alpha substrate as a local-first, proof-native runtime layer:

- Defines native Agent OS contracts for tickets, capability manifests, proof events, artifacts, lifecycle/status, and sandbox/security docs.
- Adds full-local sidecars for Blackboard dispatch, signal-hub routing, proof journaling, Sentinel model proxying, memory wiki readiness, and Windows-native bridge dispatch.
- Packages capability agent scripts, proof kit, sidecar scripts, and docs so a tarball install includes the runnable substrate.
- Hardens default local exposure: Docker-published Gateway, bridge, Teams, and Sentinel ports default to `127.0.0.1`; Sentinel requires a token by default; sidecars run with dropped network caps and `no-new-privileges`.
- Adds restart-safe Blackboard/proof DB behavior with busy timeouts, host checkpointing, and durable journal-mode allowlisting.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: OpenClaw can boot a full-local Agent OS alpha stack, accept a Blackboard task, route it through a capability agent path, produce proof/artifacts, restart signal-hub, and prove ticket/proof state survives restart while keeping host-published ports loopback-only by default.
- Real environment tested: Windows host with Docker Desktop, rebuilt `openclaw:local` image from this branch, full-local compose stack on alternate host ports `18799`, `18800`, `3979`, and `18899`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: rebuilt with `node scripts/docker/full-local.mjs up`, then ran `node scripts/docker/full-local.mjs status`, `node scripts/docker/full-local.mjs smoke`, `node scripts/docker/full-local.mjs golden`, and checked Docker-published ports with `docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.sidecars.yml --profile local-sidecars port ...` using `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=18799 OPENCLAW_SENTINEL_PORT=18899 OPENCLAW_BRIDGE_PORT=18800 OPENCLAW_MSTEAMS_PORT=3979`.
- Evidence after fix: copied live output from the rebuilt Docker stack showed `Full local proof: ready`, `OK service:openclaw-gateway`, `OK service:openclaw-sentinel`, `OK service:openclaw-signal-hub`, `OK service:openclaw-obsidian-syncer`, `OK gateway:readyz`, `OK sentinel:readyz`, `OK memory-wiki:status`; Docker port output showed `127.0.0.1:18799`, `127.0.0.1:18800`, `127.0.0.1:3979`, and `127.0.0.1:18899`; smoke produced ticket `a1fc09b3-5469-4603-8bcd-7c7d9bb2d21d` with status `DONE`; the golden artifact reported ticket `591c3f07-8c31-474d-9ced-9cd80987e512`, `ok: true`, `failedChecks: []`, `restartJournalMode: DELETE`, and `readinessAfterRestart: true`.
- Observed result after fix: The rebuilt full-local stack stayed healthy after restart proof, delivered the smoke ticket, kept all host-published ports on loopback, and generated a golden E2E proof bundle with no failed checks.
- What was not tested: Remote Crabbox/Testbox proof is still blocked from this machine because `crabbox` failed wrapper sanity checks and `blacksmith` is not installed; this draft PR needs maintainer CI/Testbox validation for remote proof.

## Additional verification

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tooling.config.ts test/scripts/full-local-docker.test.ts test/scripts/capability-agent-profile.test.ts test/scripts/agent-os-contracts.test.ts test/scripts/proof-events.test.ts test/scripts/capability-proof-kit.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/nvidia/sentinel-gateway.test.ts
node --check scripts/docker/full-local.mjs; node --check scripts/docker/sidecars/signal-hub.cjs; node --check scripts/docker/sidecars/blackboard-cli.cjs; node --check scripts/docker/sidecars/windows-node.cjs
pnpm exec oxfmt --check docker-compose.yml docker-compose.sidecars.yml scripts/docker/full-local.mjs scripts/docker/sidecars/signal-hub.cjs scripts/docker/sidecars/blackboard-cli.cjs scripts/docker/sidecars/windows-node.cjs test/scripts/full-local-docker.test.ts docs/tools/capability-agents.md
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.sidecars.yml --profile local-sidecars config --quiet
git diff --check
npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts
```

- Focused Agent OS tests: `104 passed | 1 skipped`.
- Sentinel gateway tests: `30 passed`.
- Package dry-run includes the Agent OS scripts, sidecars, contracts, proof libraries, and docs.
